Interface TaskExecutionListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
TaskBatchExecutionListener, TaskExecutionListenerSupport, TaskListenerExecutor
public interface TaskExecutionListener
The listener interface for receiving task execution events.
Author:
Glenn Renfro

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onTaskEnd(TaskExecution taskExecution)
    Invoked before the TaskExecution has been updated in the TaskRepository upon task end.
    default void
    onTaskFailed(TaskExecution taskExecution, Throwable throwable)
    Invoked if an uncaught exception occurs during a task execution.
    default void
    onTaskStartup(TaskExecution taskExecution)
    Invoked after the TaskExecution has been stored in the TaskRepository.

  • Method Details

    • onTaskStartup

      default void onTaskStartup(TaskExecution taskExecution)
      Invoked after the TaskExecution has been stored in the TaskRepository.
      Parameters:
      taskExecution - instance containing the information about the current task.

    • onTaskEnd

      default void onTaskEnd(TaskExecution taskExecution)
      Invoked before the TaskExecution has been updated in the TaskRepository upon task end.
      Parameters:
      taskExecution - instance containing the information about the current task.

    • onTaskFailed

      default void onTaskFailed(TaskExecution taskExecution, Throwable throwable)
      Invoked if an uncaught exception occurs during a task execution. This invocation will occur before the TaskExecution has been updated in the TaskRepository and before the onTaskEnd is called.
      Parameters:
      taskExecution - instance containing the information about the current task.
      throwable - the uncaught exception that was thrown during task execution.
